title: "Replication value of 0" error inside unreachable code

features.name: replication operator with zero count in unreachable code
features.description: Code should include a replication operator with a count expression that evaluates to zero at compile time, placed inside an unreachable code branch controlled by a parameter condition

features.name: constant division in replication count
features.description: Code should include a replication operator where the replication count is a division of compile-time constant parameters that can evaluate to zero
